generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed: 'New report shows that 78% of Americans actually support strengthening domestic defense production to reduce reliance on foreign suppliers. Even our neighbors are realizing that strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about having reliable options when global supply chains get disrupted. Makes sense to me. #NationalSecurity #MadeInUSA'
